title: Dashboard checkpoint visibility
description: Extend dashboard to scan checkpoints and include active checkpoints with stale checkpoint detection (>7 days old).
trigger: When checkpoint-resume is used 3+ times and CEO wants dashboard visibility

title: Migrate sw consumer repo .context/ to new context tree structure
description: The sw repo still uses the old context tree structure (goals/_index.md, goal.md, backlog.md, features/active/done/). Migrate to the new SPEC.md structure: goal.json, backlog.json, projects/ with project.json. Also update scripts/index-state.ts in sw to read the new format.
trigger: After dashboard-glob-reads is complete and agent-conductor migration is merged
